meaning: Requests whose raw affinity candidate set contains at least one candidate.
notes: Does not count candidate<=1 as a special case; it is a raw opportunity metric.

meaning: Dispatcher-observed reuse: selected instance had previously received the same prefix in the cell.
notes: Not a private vLLM cache counter.

meaning: Serialized interface-size model including coarse base N*96B and affinity entries.
notes: Sketch entries are per instance, bounded by K.

meaning: P95 candidate count before J truncation.
P95 candidate count actually evaluated after J truncation.
Bounded-admission saved Prefill work divided by full Exact Affinity saved work.
Candidate set nonempty but no candidate remains valid at lookup time, divided by all requests.
Fraction of requests that reuse incompatible or absent state.
notes: Must be zero with validation enabled.

meaning: state_size is in-memory object size; snapshot_B is serialized control-plane bytes.
Synthetic Zipf prefix popularity. CPU: alpha in {1.25,0.85,0.15}; live: alpha in {1.35,0.75,0.05}.
notes: The two alpha sets must not be pooled.
